parameters.name: SelectedTab
parameters.label: Dashboard View
parameters.jsonData:
[
  {"value":"Overview","label":"🏠 Overview"},
  {"value":"Performance","label":"💻 Performance"},
  {"value":"DrillDown","label":"🔍 VM Drill Down"},
  {"value":"Services","label":"🖥 Services"},
  {"value":"Network","label":"🌐 Network"},
  {"value":"Capacity","label":"📈 Capacity"}
]

parameters.name: Workspaces
parameters.label: Log Analytics Workspace
parameters.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'
| project id, label = name, selected = true

parameters.name: SelectedVM
parameters.label: VM Filter
parameters.query:
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer
| order by Computer asc
| project value = tolower(Computer), label = Computer

content.json:
## 🏠 Overview — Fleet Health
Heartbeat-based host status and active threshold alerts across all monitored VMs.

content.query:
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), OS = any(OSType) by Computer
| extend Status = iff(LastSeen >= ago(5m), '✅ Up', '🔴 Down')
| extend MinAgo = datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastSeen)
| project Computer, Status, OS, LastSeen, MinAgo
| order by Status asc, Computer asc
content.title: Host Up / Down Status

content.query:
let CPU = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(15m)
| where Namespace == 'Processor' and Name == 'UtilizationPercentage'
| summarize AvgVal = avg(Val) by Computer
| where AvgVal > 80
| extend Alert = strcat('🔴 CPU > 80% (', round(AvgVal,1), '%)'), Metric = 'CPU';
let MEM = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(15m)
| where Namespace == 'Memory' and Name == 'AvailableMB'
| extend TotalMB = toreal(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/memorySizeMB'])
| where TotalMB > 0
| extend UsedPct = (1.0 - (Val / TotalMB)) * 100.0
| summarize AvgVal = avg(UsedPct) by Computer
| where AvgVal > 85
| extend Alert = strcat('🟠 Mem > 85% (', round(AvgVal,1), '%)'), Metric = 'Memory';
let DISK = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(15m)
| where Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpacePercentage'
| extend Disk = tostring(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| extend Disk = iff(isempty(Disk), 'unknown', Disk)
| where not(Disk startswith '/snap' or Disk startswith '/sys' or Disk startswith '/proc' or Disk startswith '/dev' or Disk startswith '/run')
| summarize AvgVal = avg(Val) by Computer
| where AvgVal < 15
| extend Alert = strcat('🟡 Disk < 15% (', round(AvgVal,1), '%)'), Metric = 'Disk';
union CPU, MEM, DISK
| project Computer, Metric, Alert
| order by Computer asc, Metric asc
content.title: Active Threshold Alerts (last 15 min)

content.json:
## 💻 Performance — CPU, Memory & Disk
Per-VM time-series charts and summary statistics.

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Processor' and Name == 'UtilizationPercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| summarize AvgCPU = round(avg(Val), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), Computer
| order by TimeGenerated asc, Computer asc
content.title: CPU Utilization % — Per VM

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Memory' and Name == 'AvailableMB'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| extend TotalMB = toreal(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/memorySizeMB'])
| where TotalMB > 0
| extend UsedPct = round((1.0 - (Val / TotalMB)) * 100.0, 2)
| extend UsedPct = iff(UsedPct < 0.0, 0.0, iff(UsedPct > 100.0, 100.0, UsedPct))
| summarize AvgMemPct = round(avg(UsedPct), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), Computer
| order by TimeGenerated asc, Computer asc
content.title: Memory Used % — Per VM

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpacePercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| extend Disk = tostring(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| extend Disk = iff(isempty(Disk), 'unknown', Disk)
| where not(Disk startswith '/snap' or Disk startswith '/sys' or Disk startswith '/proc' or Disk startswith '/dev' or Disk startswith '/run')
| summarize AvgFreePct = round(avg(Val), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), Computer, Disk
| extend SeriesLabel = strcat(Computer, ' — ', Disk)
| project TimeGenerated, SeriesLabel, AvgFreePct
| order by TimeGenerated asc, SeriesLabel asc
content.title: Disk Free % — Per VM Per Mount

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Processor' and Name == 'UtilizationPercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| summarize AvgCPU = round(avg(Val), 2), MaxCPU = round(max(Val), 2), P95CPU = round(percentile(Val, 95), 2) by Computer
| extend CPUAlert = iff(P95CPU > 85, '🔴 High', iff(P95CPU > 60, '🟡 Medium', '🟢 Normal'))
| order by P95CPU desc
content.title: CPU Summary — Avg / Max / P95 per VM

content.json:
## 🔍 VM Drill Down
👆 Click a row in the inventory grid to load detailed metrics for that VM.

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), Namespaces = make_set(Namespace) by Computer
| extend Status = iff(LastSeen >= ago(15m), '✅ Active', '⚠️ Stale')
| project Computer, Status, LastSeen, Namespaces
| order by Computer asc
content.title: VM Inventory — Click a row to drill down

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Processor' and Name == 'UtilizationPercentage'
| where Computer =~ '{DrillVM}'
| summarize AvgCPU = round(avg(Val), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: CPU % — {DrillVM}

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Memory' and Name == 'AvailableMB'
| where Computer =~ '{DrillVM}'
| extend TotalMB = toreal(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/memorySizeMB'])
| where TotalMB > 0
| extend UsedPct = round((1.0 - (Val / TotalMB)) * 100.0, 2)
| extend UsedPct = iff(UsedPct < 0.0, 0.0, iff(UsedPct > 100.0, 100.0, UsedPct))
| summarize AvgMemPct = round(avg(UsedPct), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Memory Used % — {DrillVM}

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpacePercentage'
| where Computer =~ '{DrillVM}'
| extend Disk = tostring(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| extend Disk = iff(isempty(Disk), 'unknown', Disk)
| where not(Disk startswith '/snap' or Disk startswith '/sys' or Disk startswith '/proc' or Disk startswith '/dev' or Disk startswith '/run')
| summarize AvgFreePct = round(avg(Val), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1m), Disk
| order by TimeGenerated asc, Disk asc
content.title: Disk Free % — Each Mount Point ({DrillVM})

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpacePercentage'
| where Computer =~ '{DrillVM}'
| extend Disk = tostring(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| extend Disk = iff(isempty(Disk), 'unknown', Disk)
| where not(Disk startswith '/snap' or Disk startswith '/sys' or Disk startswith '/proc' or Disk startswith '/dev' or Disk startswith '/run')
| summarize CurrentFree = round(avg(Val), 1), MinFree = round(min(Val), 1), MaxFree = round(max(Val), 1) by Disk
| extend Status = iff(CurrentFree < 10, '🔴 Critical', iff(CurrentFree < 20, '🟡 Warning', '🟢 OK'))
| order by CurrentFree asc
content.title: Disk Free % Summary — All Mounts ({DrillVM})

content.query:
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer =~ '{DrillVM}'
| summarize Heartbeats = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Heartbeat (5m bins) — {DrillVM}

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Network'
| where Name in ('WriteBytesPerSecond','ReadBytesPerSecond')
| where Computer =~ '{DrillVM}'
| extend Interface = tostring(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/networkDeviceId'])
| extend MBps = round(Val / 1048576, 4)
| extend SeriesLabel = strcat(Name, ' — ', Interface)
| summarize AvgMBps = round(avg(MBps), 4) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1m), SeriesLabel
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Network I/O MBps — {DrillVM}

content.json:
## 🖥 Windows Services — Inventory & Changes
Searchable service inventory with change history, modelled after Change Tracking & Inventory.

> ⚠️ Requires the **ChangeTracking** solution enabled on the Log Analytics Workspace.

👆 **Click any row** in the inventory grid to filter change history to that service.

content.query:
ConfigurationData
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ConfigDataType == 'WindowsServices'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Computer, SvcName
| summarize
    Running      = countif(SvcState == 'Running'),
    Stopped      = countif(SvcState == 'Stopped'),
    Disabled     = countif(SvcStartupType == 'Disabled'),
    Unknown      = countif(not(SvcState in ('Running','Stopped'))),
    TotalVMs     = dcount(Computer),
    TotalServices = count()
| project TotalServices, TotalVMs, Running, Stopped, Disabled, Unknown
content.title: Service State Summary

content.query:
ConfigurationData
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ConfigDataType == 'WindowsServices'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Computer, SvcName
| extend StateIcon = case(
    SvcState == 'Running',                         '✅ Running',
    SvcState == 'Stopped' and SvcStartupType == 'Auto', '🔴 Stopped (Auto-start!)',
    SvcState == 'Stopped',                         '🟠 Stopped',
    SvcStartupType == 'Disabled',                  '⬛ Disabled',
                                                    '🟡 Unknown')
| extend StartupIcon = case(
    SvcStartupType == 'Auto',     '🟢 Auto',
    SvcStartupType == 'Manual',   '🔵 Manual',
    SvcStartupType == 'Disabled', '⬛ Disabled',
                                   '❓ Unknown')
| project Computer,
    DisplayName    = SvcDisplayName,
    ServiceKey     = SvcName,
    StateIcon,
    StartupIcon,
    ServiceAccount = SvcAccount,
    LastUpdated    = TimeGenerated
| order by Computer asc, StateIcon asc, DisplayName asc
content.title: Service Inventory — Current State  🔍 Click a row to see its change history

content.query:
ConfigurationChange
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ConfigChangeType == 'WindowsServices'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| where isempty('{SelectedService}') or SvcName =~ '{SelectedService}'
| where isempty('{ServiceComputer}')  or Computer =~ '{ServiceComputer}'
| extend ChangeIcon = case(
    ChangeCategory == 'Added',    '➕ Added',
    ChangeCategory == 'Removed',  '➖ Removed',
    ChangeCategory == 'Modified', '✏️ Modified',
                                   '❓ Other')
| project TimeGenerated, Computer,
    DisplayName    = SvcDisplayName,
    ServiceKey     = SvcName,
    ChangeIcon,
    PreviousState  = Previous,
    CurrentState   = Current
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Change History — {SelectedService}

content.query:
ConfigurationData
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ConfigDataType == 'WindowsServices'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Computer, SvcName
| summarize
    Total    = count(),
    Running  = countif(SvcState == 'Running'),
    Stopped  = countif(SvcState == 'Stopped'),
    Disabled = countif(SvcStartupType == 'Disabled')
  by Computer
| extend StoppedPct = round(todouble(Stopped) / Total * 100, 1)
| order by Stopped desc, Computer asc
content.title: Services by Computer — Running / Stopped / Disabled

content.query:
ConfigurationChange
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ConfigChangeType == 'WindowsServices'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| extend ChangeIcon = case(
    ChangeCategory == 'Added',    '➕ Added',
    ChangeCategory == 'Removed',  '➖ Removed',
    ChangeCategory == 'Modified', '✏️ Modified',
                                   '❓ Other')
| project TimeGenerated, Computer,
    DisplayName   = SvcDisplayName,
    ServiceKey    = SvcName,
    ChangeIcon,
    PreviousState = Previous,
    CurrentState  = Current
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: All Recent Service Changes

content.json:
## 🌐 Network I/O
Read and Write throughput per VM per network interface (MBps).

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Network' and Name == 'ReadBytesPerSecond'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| extend Interface = tostring(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/networkDeviceId'])
| extend MBps = round(Val / 1048576, 4)
| extend SeriesLabel = strcat(Computer, ' — ', Interface)
| summarize AvgMBps = round(avg(MBps), 4) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), SeriesLabel
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Network Read (MBps) — Per VM Per Interface

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Network' and Name == 'WriteBytesPerSecond'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| extend Interface = tostring(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/networkDeviceId'])
| extend MBps = round(Val / 1048576, 4)
| extend SeriesLabel = strcat(Computer, ' — ', Interface)
| summarize AvgMBps = round(avg(MBps), 4) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), SeriesLabel
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Network Write (MBps) — Per VM Per Interface

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Network' and Name in ('ReadBytesPerSecond','WriteBytesPerSecond')
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| extend MBps = Val / 1048576
| summarize AvgMBps = round(avg(MBps), 4), MaxMBps = round(max(MBps), 4) by Computer, Name
| extend Direction = iff(Name == 'ReadBytesPerSecond', '⬇️ Read', '⬆️ Write')
| project Computer, Direction, AvgMBps, MaxMBps
| order by Computer asc, Direction asc
content.title: Network Summary — Avg & Max MBps per VM

content.json:
## 📈 Capacity Planning
90-day ML disk forecast and memory P95 trend.

> ⚠️ Forecast requires **at least 7 days** of historical data.

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpacePercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| extend Disk = tostring(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| extend Disk = iff(isempty(Disk), 'unknown', Disk)
| where not(Disk startswith '/snap' or Disk startswith '/sys' or Disk startswith '/proc' or Disk startswith '/dev' or Disk startswith '/run')
| extend SeriesKey = strcat(Computer, '|', Disk)
| make-series FreePct = avg(Val) on TimeGenerated
    from ago(30d) to now()+90d step 1d by SeriesKey
| extend forecast = series_decompose_forecast(FreePct, 90)
| mv-expand TimeGenerated to typeof(datetime),
    FreePct to typeof(double), forecast to typeof(double)
| project TimeGenerated, SeriesKey,
    FreePct     = iff(TimeGenerated <= now(), FreePct,  real(null)),
    ForecastPct = iff(TimeGenerated >  now(), forecast, real(null))
| order by SeriesKey asc, TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Disk Free % — 90-Day Forecast (ML per mount)

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpacePercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| extend Disk = tostring(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| extend Disk = iff(isempty(Disk), 'unknown', Disk)
| where not(Disk startswith '/snap' or Disk startswith '/sys' or Disk startswith '/proc' or Disk startswith '/dev' or Disk startswith '/run')
| extend SeriesKey = strcat(Computer, '|', Disk)
| make-series FreePct = avg(Val) on TimeGenerated
    from ago(30d) to now()+90d step 1d by SeriesKey, Computer, Disk
| extend forecast = series_decompose_forecast(FreePct, 90)
| extend ForecastAt90d = todouble(forecast[array_length(forecast)-1])
| extend ForecastAt30d = todouble(forecast[array_length(forecast)-60])
| extend Status90d = iff(ForecastAt90d < 10.0, '🔴 Critical',
    iff(ForecastAt90d < 20.0, '🟡 Watch', '🟢 OK'))
| project Computer, Disk,
    CurrentFreePct = round(todouble(FreePct[array_length(FreePct)-1]), 1),
    ForecastAt30d  = round(ForecastAt30d, 1),
    ForecastAt90d  = round(ForecastAt90d, 1), Status90d
| order by ForecastAt90d asc
content.title: Disk Capacity — 30d & 90d Outlook

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Memory' and Name == 'AvailableMB'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| extend TotalMB = toreal(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/memorySizeMB'])
| where TotalMB > 0
| extend UsedPct = round((1.0 - (Val / TotalMB)) * 100.0, 2)
| extend UsedPct = iff(UsedPct < 0.0, 0.0, iff(UsedPct > 100.0, 100.0, UsedPct))
| summarize P95Mem = round(percentile(UsedPct, 95), 2),
    AvgMem = round(avg(UsedPct), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Computer
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Memory Used % Trend (Avg + P95) — Per VM
